zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Umfraville於大約1385年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Thomas Umfraville25歲，母親Agnes Grey22歲。她於1413年與Sir Thomas Lambert在英國英格蘭達勒姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1446年之後在英國，埋葬在英國達勒姆哈特勒普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Umfraville于大约1385年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲Thomas Umfraville25岁，母亲Agnes Grey22岁。她于1413年与Sir Thomas Lambert在英国英格兰達勒姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1446年之后在英国，埋葬在英国達勒姆哈特勒普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Umfraville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Umfraville was born about 1385, in Northumberland, England, her father, Thomas Umfraville, was 25 and her mother, Agnes Grey, was 22. She married Sir Thomas Lambert in 1413, in Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1446, in England, and was buried in Hartlepool, Durham, England.

fr.Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, E: Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Everwyck, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Umfraville est née environ 1385, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Umfraville, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes Grey, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Lambert en 1413, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1446, à Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Hartlepool, Durham, Angleterre.

de.Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, E: Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Umfraville um 1385 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Umfraville 25 und ihre Mutter Agnes Grey 22. Sie hat 1413 in Durham, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Lambert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1446 in England und wurde in Hartlepool, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Umfraville è nata il circa 1385 nel Northumberland, England, sua padre, Thomas Umfraville, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Agnes Grey, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Lambert nel 1413, nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1446, nel England, e fu sepolta a Hartlepool, Durham, England.

ko.Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, E: 영국 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Umfraville(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Umfraville(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Grey(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1413년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 Sir Thomas Lambert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1446년 이후 영국에서 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 하틀레프에 묻혔다.

pt.Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, E: Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Umfraville nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Umfraville, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Grey, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Lambert em 1413, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1446, em Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Hartlepool, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, E: кингстон упон хулл ст мэри, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Umfraville родилась около 1385 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Umfraville было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Grey, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Lambert в 1413 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1446 г. в местности Англия и была похоронена в местности хартлепул, дурам, Англия.
